title: ageratina humboldtii
intro: Ageratina humboldtii, also known as False Dragon's Blood or Yerba de la Reina, is a plant species in the mint family native to Central and South America. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Ageratina humboldtii is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to offer numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Ageratina humboldtii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
